stemHtml:
Which of the following statements are correct about the pilots and the cabin crew?

  1. On-deck seat belts must be worn at all times when the seat is occupied
  2. At least one pilot must be available at all times with the seat belt on
  3. Cabin crew must always use seat belts on their station during take-off and landing
  4. Out of two, one pilot must wear the seat belt, and the other may remove it during take-off and landing
  5. One aircrew may be available when the other has gone away for physiological reasons
